task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for 3-Bedroom Townhouse in Boston MA (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $1200000.00 and wholesale is $960000.00. Product features: Historic brownstone with original features and modern updates in Back Bay. Reference: https://www.compass.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for 3-Bedroom Townhouse in Boston MA. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying 3-Bedroom Townhouse in Boston MA. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
